TextENGNew: I woke up with a light cough and a strange irritation in my throat.
Looking at the clock, it was past 3 AM.
Since I got into bed around midnight, that meant I had gotten about three hours of sleep.
(That is weird...)
I always took pride in being a good sleeper, so waking up in the middle of the night... was abnormal.
However, tomorrow... or technically, today, I have morning training with the track and field club.
If I do not get enough rest, I am more likely to injure myself at practice.
I thought that and rolled back over, but... I suddenly started feeling thirsty and opened my eyes again.
For some reason... I could not sleep.
Falling back asleep would be ideal, but I decided that I should get a drink of water from the kitchen to cool off, so I climbed out of bed.
Then I stood up and unsteadily made her way toward the door, reaching my hand for the doorknob...
changeReason: Old says 'unsteadily walked toward the door' vs new says 'unsteadily made her way toward the door'; new incorrectly uses 'her' instead of first-person 'my', introducing a pronoun error.

TextENGNew: The moment I opened the door, intense heat blew into the room.
I could not help turn my head down and stumble, but I raised my head and opened my eyes... and was so shocked I froze on the spot.
Even though the lights should have been out, the hallway was lit up in bright red.
And even though it was the middle of the night, there was a shivering roaring sound, and a strange odor in the air.
And what's more... the stairs in the corner of the hallway leading down to the first floor were smothered in an intense blaze...!
That moment, the plate on the door opposite my room came into view, and I returned to my senses.
Madoka might still be asleep without noticing this.
I rushed over and banged hard on her door while screaming out loud, forgetting that it was the middle of the night.
``Madoka, wake up!@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2318. Come on, Madoka!!``
``...What's going on, Sis?@k@vS20/29/VTK2_madoka2002. Do you know what time it is...?!``
Madoka came out looking sleepy, but as soon as she saw the flames brilliantly dyeing the hallway in light, she opened her eyes wide and stood there trembling at the unfathomable situation.
...That goes without saying.
Nobody sees a fire like this in their everyday life.
Especially not in your own home...!
``It's all right, your Sis is here. We're together!@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2320. ...Dad, Mom!!@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2321. Fire... There's a fire!!@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2322. Hurry, get out of here!!``
I shouted at the top of my lungs toward my parents, who should be sleeping downstairs.
...But there was no reply.
I carefully approached the stairs while watching the fire, raising my voice to call out to them... but again, there was no response.
(Maybe they still have not noticed...?@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2324. Or maybe... Oh no?!)
I shook my head to stave off the terrible thought that arrived at mind.
changeReason: Old says 'I shook my head to stave off the terrible thought that came to mind' vs new says 'arrived at mind'; new has grammatical error ('arrived at mind' instead of 'came to mind').

TextENGNew: No way... that cannot be!
Plus, my Dad is a detective! He should be quick to catch on!
Even if he was asleep, there is no way he would not notice something so unusual going on in the house!
I am sure he already ran out of the house... He just could not make it upstairs because of the fire!
And I am sure he is watching from outside the house right now, thinking about how to help us!!
Yes... That must be it!
I am certain of it!!
``M...Mom... Dad...!@k@vS20/29/VTK2_madoka2006. Help... Hurry, come help us!@k@vS20/29/VTK2_madoka2007. There's... there's a fiiire!!``
``Madoka, calm down!@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2327. For now, we need to get out of here!``
``G-get out of here...? How?!@k@vS20/29/VTK2_madoka2009. The stairs are burning up... We can't go down!! I... I'm scared...!``
I looked back at my room beyond the hallway and gazed out the window.
Right, there should be a garden just below my room.
The ground there is all dirt, so it is unlikely the fire has spread there...!
``Madoka, the window!@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2330. We'll get down through the window!``
``...Huh?!@k@vS20/29/VTK2_madoka2011. N-no way... how?@k@vS20/29/VTK2_madoka2012. If we jump from this high up, won't we get hurt?!``
``Getting hurt is better than dying!@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2332. ...Now hold on to me and hurry up!!``
After saying that, I forcibly dragged Madoka into my room, ran over to the window, opened it, and looked down... then I suddenly gasped.
I was surprised that the distance to the ground felt far higher than expected.
...But more importantly, the window and sliding door in the living room had been blown off and were laying on the ground in the garden, while roaring flames could be clearly seen inside the room.
And what's more, there were scattered fragments of shattered glass on the ground, with their sharp, evil blades shining that crimson light right at us...!
``Uu...!@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2334. M-Mom, Dad!!@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2335. Madoka and I are over here!@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2336. Hurry... Come heeere!!``
I squeezed my voice as hard as I could and called out to my parents, who should already be outside the house.
...However, there was no response.
In fact, I could not see any signs of them near the garden or the entryway.
``...?!@k@vS20/29/VTK2_madoka2014. S-Sis, the fire!``
Turning back toward Madoka's pained voice, I saw the flames in the hallway had already spread to the door frame, showing signs of even creeping into the room.
There is no time to hesitate...!
I closed my eyes and made a desperate prayer for the first time in my life, then opened them again.
Then, I squeezed Madoka's trembling body and wrapped her arms around my shoulders, while tearing the sheets off the bed and using them as a rope to tie us together around the waist.
``...Close your eyes.@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2340. And never, ever let go of me!``
Upon hearing that, Madoka clung to my shoulders so tight it felt a little suffocating, and she closed her eyes tight with determination.
...I thought about jumping first so that I would be able to catch Madoka, but I worried she could not bring herself to jump and would not be able to escape until it was too late.
So... even though there is some risk involved, this is the best method.
Even in the worst case, I should be able to land underneath Madoka to protect her...!
``...Here we go.@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2342. ...!!``
I tore off the curtain and made it into a long string, then tied it around one of the legs of the bed.
Then I firmly grasped it in both hands while hanging outside the window, shaking off my hesitation and fear as I held Madoka in my arms and began to descend to the garden.
However,
``Kyaaah?!``
Since it was just a thin piece of cloth, it could not withstand the load of two people. So the fabric tore near the middle of the curtain.
...Even so, the height we fell from was about the height of a full-grown adult, so I was able to hit the ground just lightly stumbling down on my butt.
Just a few minutes later, the fire had overtaken our room.
I had a slight bruise from the fall and a few cuts on my arm from the glass, but I was not seriously hurt.
And of course, Madoka was fine.
Soon after that, we were rescued by firefighters and received first aid in a nearby vacant lot.
But... even after being rescued, we were both still trembling.
My nose twitched from the irritating stench all around the area.
My throat ached like it was stuffed with burning sand, and the coughing would not stop even after taking deep breaths.
When I rubbed my cheeks, they were sticky with a mix of soot and sweat.
...But I was so stunned I could not even feel bothered by it... I just kept gazing at the wreckage that should have been my home.
After the fire trucks parked along the road began firing water, the flames were finally beginning to calm down.
The smoke blowing around the area changed from black to white, and the heat that threatened to burn my skin gradually cooled off.
But... it is strange.
Even though my house... was supposed to be bright white and very beautiful.
Why is it burnt pitch black... with no roof, no walls, no windows...?
Upon hearing that voice, I turned and gazed at my sister Madoka, who was still shaking in my arms.
She was closing her eyes so firmly it resembled she was trying to escape from reality... tightly clenching my clothes and never letting go.
changeReason: Old says 'it looked like she was trying to escape from reality' vs new says 'it resembled she was trying to escape'; new has awkward phrasing ('resembled she was').

TextENGNew: ...I wished to escape too, if it were possible.
So many times, I prayed in my heart that this scene was just a delusion from a nightmare.
If it is a dream, just wake me up already.
Let morning come... and bring back the calm, everyday scenery I would been living in until just yesterday...!
changeReason: Old says 'the calm, everyday scenery I'd been living in' vs new says 'I would been living in'; new has grammatical error ('would been' instead of 'had been' — incorrectly expanded the contraction).

TextENGNew: However.
My head became clearer and clearer and I felt more awake, as if to mock my desperate wish.
And the signs of the fire assaulting all five of my senses put my consciousness firmly in reality...
``...! That's right, what about Mom and Dad...?!``
I suddenly realized that I would forgotten about them all this time, then ran over to a nearby ambulance with Madoka.
changeReason: Old says 'I'd forgotten about them' vs new says 'I would forgotten about them'; same grammatical error as above — incorrect contraction expansion.

TextENGNew: ...There was nobody there but the staff who had treated us.
And no signs of anyone being brought there.
Nevertheless, I shook off the increasingly growing dire feeling I had, while grabbing one of the firefighters by the arm and entrusting him with my single hope by asking him all at once.
changeReason: Old says 'bad feeling' vs new says 'dire feeling'; different intensity word.

TextENGNew: ``E-excuse me, firefighter!@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2349. Umm... uhh, wh-what about our Mom and Dad...?!``
``...Huh?@k@vS20/00/VTK2_shobouA2002. There were more than just the two of you in that house?!``

``Y-yes!@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2351. My Dad and my Mom were in a room on the first floor!@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2352. Ah... it's on the other side of the living room over there, across the hallway!@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2353. ...?!``
The moment I saw the startled look on the firefighter's face... all the blood in my body... began pumping audibly.
...It cannot be... Huh...?
Does that mean... the only people rescued from the house... were just... me and Madoka?
Then... Mom and Dad are... No way...?!
It cannot be true...?!
``...Excuse me, coming through!@k@vS20/00/VTK2_qqA2002. Please make way!``
``Step aside, please!@k@vS20/00/VTK2_qqB2002. Two other victims have been discovered, and need to be transported to the hospital immediately!``
``Both have suffered cardiac arrest!@k@vS20/00/VTK2_qqA2004. For now, take resuscitation measures while in the ambulance!!``
From the direction of that roaring voice.
Two stretchers covered in white cloth were being carried out by firefighters, breaking through the wall of people.
Two... victims...?
And... they suffered cardiac arrest...?
``M...Mom!@k@vS20/29/VTK2_madoka2020. Moooom!!``
After hearing that, Madoka pushed me aside as I stood there absentmindedly, and she dashed toward the stretchers.
I rushed after her... but there was no time to stop her.
``You there, please wait!!``
``Stop!!@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2356. Don't look... You can't look!!@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2357. Madokaaa!!``
``M...Mom...?@k@vS20/29/VTK2_madoka2022. D-Da... ah, aaaaaah...!!``
Madoka approached the stretcher and tore off the white cloth... allowing both of us to see what lay underneath.
It was...
It was...!!
``Aaaaaaaaaahhh!!@k@vS20/29/VTK2_madoka2024. Hiiyaaaaaahh!!@k@vS20/29/VTK2_madoka2025. Noooooooo!!!``
``Madoka?@k@vS20/28/VTK2_tomoe2361. Get a hold of yourself, Madokaaa!!``
Why...? Why?!
Why did this have to happen to our family...!?!
